query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.is_active FROM cities c ORDER BY c.id; SELECT s.id, s.name, s.city_id, c.name as city_name FROM streets s JOIN cities c ON s.city_id = c.id ORDER BY s.city_id, s.id;
